# Wasm Trace JSON Tabs Implementation Plan

> **For agentic workers:** REQUIRED SUB-SKILL: Use superpowers:subagent-driven-development (recommended) or superpowers:executing-plans to implement this plan task-by-task. Steps use checkbox (`- [ ]`) syntax for tracking.

**Goal:** Make the Emscripten/XED web UI show Rust-generated trace HTML by default, with JSON available in a separate tab.

**Architecture:** Extend `uica-emscripten` to return a web result envelope containing `UicaResult` plus trace HTML generated by existing `uica_core::report::render_trace_html`. Update `web/index.html`, `web/main.js`, and CSS so analysis populates Trace and JSON tabs, rendering trace HTML in a sandboxed iframe via `srcdoc`. Keep pure `uica-wasm`, CLI, and shared `.uipack` manifest path unchanged.

**Tech Stack:** Rust workspace, `uica-core` report rendering, Emscripten C ABI string return, JavaScript ES modules, iframe `srcdoc`, existing UIPack browser cache.

---

## Task checklist

- [ ] Task 1: Add failing Rust contract test for web result envelope
- [ ] Task 2: Implement Rust web result envelope with trace HTML
- [ ] Task 3: Add Trace/JSON tab markup and styles
- [ ] Task 4: Update Emscripten JS controller to render tabs
- [ ] Task 5: Remove third-party scripts from trace template
- [ ] Task 6: Run local Rust and web verification
- [ ] Task 7: Optional Emscripten smoke with emsdk active

## Task 1: Add failing Rust contract test for web result envelope

**Files:**

- Modify: `rust/uica-emscripten/tests/run_contract.rs`

- [ ] **Step 1: Add test expecting trace web envelope**

Append test:

```rust
#[test]
fn run_returns_web_envelope_with_trace_html() {
    let pack = include_bytes!("../../uica-data/generated/arch/SKL.uipack");
    let output = uica_emscripten::run_request_json(r#"{"hex":"48 01 d8","arch":"SKL"}"#, pack);
    let value: Value = serde_json::from_str(&output).unwrap();

    assert_eq!(value["schema_version"], "uica-web-result-v1");
    assert_eq!(value["engine"], "rust-emscripten-xed");
    assert_eq!(value["result"]["schema_version"], "uica-result-v1");
    assert_eq!(value["result"]["engine"], "rust");
    assert_eq!(value["result"]["invocation"]["arch"], "SKL");
    let trace_html = value["trace_html"].as_str().unwrap();
    assert!(trace_html.contains("Execution Trace"));
    assert!(trace_html.contains("var tableData = ["));
}
```

- [ ] **Step 2: Run test and verify failure**

Run:

```bash
cargo test -p uica-emscripten run_returns_web_envelope_with_trace_html
```

Expected: FAIL because current output schema is `uica-result-v1`, not `uica-web-result-v1`.

## Task 2: Implement Rust web result envelope with trace HTML

**Files:**

- Modify: `rust/uica-emscripten/src/lib.rs`
- Modify: `rust/uica-emscripten/tests/run_contract.rs`

- [ ] **Step 1: Add serializable envelope type**

Add near `RunError`:

```rust
#[derive(Serialize)]
struct WebRunResult {
    schema_version: &'static str,
    engine: &'static str,
    result: uica_model::UicaResult,
    trace_html: String,
}
```

- [ ] **Step 2: Request reports and render trace**

Replace final engine call in `run_request_json_inner` with:

```rust
let output =
    uica_core::engine::engine_output_with_uipack_runtime(&code, &invocation, &runtime, true)?;
let reports = output
    .reports
    .as_ref()
    .ok_or_else(|| "report engine did not produce trace data".to_string())?;
let trace_html = uica_core::report::render_trace_html(&reports.trace)?;
let response = WebRunResult {
    schema_version: "uica-web-result-v1",
    engine: "rust-emscripten-xed",
    result: output.result,
    trace_html,
};
serde_json::to_string(&response).map_err(|err| err.to_string())
```

- [ ] **Step 3: Update existing positive test**

Change `run_decodes_hex_and_returns_uica_result` expectations to inspect `value["result"]` instead of top-level result:

```rust
assert_eq!(value["schema_version"], "uica-web-result-v1");
assert_eq!(value["engine"], "rust-emscripten-xed");
assert_eq!(value["result"]["schema_version"], "uica-result-v1");
assert_eq!(value["result"]["engine"], "rust");
assert_eq!(value["result"]["invocation"]["arch"], "SKL");
assert!(value["result"]["summary"]["throughput_cycles_per_iteration"].is_number());
```

- [ ] **Step 4: Run tests**

Run:

```bash
cargo test -p uica-emscripten
```

Expected: PASS.

## Task 3: Add Trace/JSON tab markup and styles

**Files:**

- Modify: `web/index.html`
- Modify: `web/style.css`

- [ ] **Step 1: Replace single result `<pre>` with tabs**

In result panel, use:

```html
<section class="panel">
  <div class="result-header">
    <h2>Result</h2>
    <div class="tabs" role="tablist" aria-label="Analysis output">
      <button
        id="trace-tab"
        class="tab active"
        type="button"
        role="tab"
        aria-selected="true"
        aria-controls="trace-panel"
      >
        Trace
      </button>
      <button
        id="json-tab"
        class="tab"
        type="button"
        role="tab"
        aria-selected="false"
        aria-controls="json-panel"
      >
        JSON
      </button>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div
    id="trace-panel"
    class="tab-panel active"
    role="tabpanel"
    aria-labelledby="trace-tab"
  >
    <iframe
      id="trace-frame"
      title="uiCA execution trace"
      sandbox="allow-scripts"
    ></iframe>
  </div>
  <div
    id="json-panel"
    class="tab-panel"
    role="tabpanel"
    aria-labelledby="json-tab"
    hidden
  >
    <pre id="output"></pre>
  </div>
</section>
```

- [ ] **Step 2: Add tab/iframe CSS**

Add:

```css
.result-header {
  display: flex;
  justify-content: space-between;
  gap: 16px;
  align-items: center;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
}

.tabs {
  display: flex;
  gap: 8px;
}

.tab {
  border: 1px solid #3c4d60;
  background: #0a0f14;
}

.tab.active {
  background: #3a7afe;
}

.tab-panel[hidden] {
  display: none;
}

#trace-frame {
  width: 100%;
  min-height: 640px;
  border: 1px solid #3c4d60;
  border-radius: 10px;
  background: white;
}
```

- [ ] **Step 3: Syntax check via build copy**

Run later in Task 5 with `./scripts/build-web.sh` when emsdk active; no separate HTML test exists.

## Task 4: Update Emscripten JS controller to render tabs

**Files:**

- Modify: `web/main.js`

- [ ] **Step 1: Add DOM references**

Add:

```js
const traceTab = document.getElementById("trace-tab");
const jsonTab = document.getElementById("json-tab");
const tracePanel = document.getElementById("trace-panel");
const jsonPanel = document.getElementById("json-panel");
const traceFrame = document.getElementById("trace-frame");
```

- [ ] **Step 2: Add tab switch helper**

Add:

```js
function selectTab(name) {
  const traceActive = name === "trace";
  traceTab.classList.toggle("active", traceActive);
  jsonTab.classList.toggle("active", !traceActive);
  traceTab.setAttribute("aria-selected", String(traceActive));
  jsonTab.setAttribute("aria-selected", String(!traceActive));
  tracePanel.hidden = !traceActive;
  jsonPanel.hidden = traceActive;
  tracePanel.classList.toggle("active", traceActive);
  jsonPanel.classList.toggle("active", !traceActive);
}
```

- [ ] **Step 3: Wire tab buttons**

Add:

```js
traceTab.addEventListener("click", () => selectTab("trace"));
jsonTab.addEventListener("click", () => selectTab("json"));
```

- [ ] **Step 4: Update successful analysis rendering**

Replace success response handling with:

```js
const parsed = JSON.parse(response);
if (parsed.error) {
  throw new Error(parsed.error);
}
const result = parsed.result ?? parsed;
const tp = result.summary.throughput_cycles_per_iteration;
traceFrame.srcdoc = parsed.trace_html ?? "<p>No trace generated.</p>";
output.textContent = JSON.stringify(result, null, 2);
status.textContent = `Analysis complete: ${tp} cycles/iteration`;
selectTab("trace");
```

- [ ] **Step 5: Keep error rendering safe**

In catch block, also clear trace:

```js
traceFrame.srcdoc = "";
output.textContent = String(error);
selectTab("json");
```

## Task 5: Remove third-party scripts from trace template

**Files:**

- Modify: `traceTemplate.html`

- [ ] **Step 1: Remove CDN dependencies**

Remove external jQuery, noUiSlider, wNumb, and CSS links from `traceTemplate.html`.

- [ ] **Step 2: Replace dependency use with first-party JavaScript**

Use `document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', ...)`, `innerHTML`, and two numeric inputs (`firstIt`, `lastIt`) to control visible iteration range.

- [ ] **Step 3: Verify trace renderer tests still pass**

```bash
cargo test -p uica-core trace_renderer
rg -n "https://|cdnjs|ajax.googleapis|noUiSlider|jQuery|\\$\\(" traceTemplate.html
```

Expected: tests pass; `rg` finds no matches.

## Task 7: Optional Emscripten smoke with emsdk active

**Files:** no edits.

- [ ] **Step 1: Build full site**

```bash
source ~/emsdk/emsdk_env.sh
./scripts/build-web.sh
scripts/smoke-emscripten-exports.sh dist/emscripten
```

Expected: build succeeds and export smoke passes.

- [ ] **Step 2: Serve locally**

```bash
python3 -m http.server -d dist 8000
```

Open `http://127.0.0.1:8000/`, run `SKL` + `48 01 d8`.

Expected:

- Trace tab selected after run.
- Trace iframe shows `Execution Trace`.
- JSON tab shows formatted `uica-result-v1` result.
